overall.description: Stationary first-person view from an elevated walkway in a futuristic cyberpunk city, focusing on an animated billboard advertisement for Matapang Coffee that cycles between a coffee promotion and zombie horror imagery. A yellow monorail train passes by on elevated tracks in the background around the 40-second mark.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with digital advertising billboard

segments.scene_description: A static view from an elevated concrete walkway in a futuristic city, dominated by a large digital billboard for Matapang Coffee that flickers between a coffee advertisement and a zombie horror image. The scene overlooks elevated monorail tracks where a yellow train passes by midway through the clip, with modern glass and concrete buildings visible in the background under diffused daylight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static first-person perspective from an elevated walkway, capturing the jarring contrast between corporate advertising and horror imagery in a futuristic cityscape. It begins with a focus on a large digital billboard for Matapang Coffee that flickers rhythmically between a polished coffee promotion and unsettling zombie horror visuals. As the camera holds its position, the diffused daylight illuminates the surrounding glass and concrete architecture of the urban sprawl. The scene then shifts in dynamic energy as a yellow monorail train glides across the elevated tracks in the background, cutting through the static composition of the city. Finally, the view settles back onto the flickering screen, emphasizing the persistent cycle of the advertisement against the backdrop of the modern metropolis.
